steps.title: Locate the walnut bars and compare their relative heights
steps.content: The dark bars show walnut prices across the four seasons from 2016/17 to 2019/20. Looking left to right, one bar is visibly shorter than the rest.

steps.title: Match the lowest price to the correct season
steps.content: The bar for 2018/19 represents the lowest walnut price among the four seasons shown. The bars for 2016/17, 2017/18, and 2019/20 are all taller, indicating higher prices. That matches choice B — B is correct.
